items.prompt: The UVM factory mainly lets you…
choices: Swap constructed types without rewriting every create call
Run only in the browser lab
items.explain: Overrides change what gets built while source still requests a base type.

items.prompt: When both apply at the same path, which wins?
choices: Instance override wins over type override
items.explain: Instance override is more specific and takes precedence at that path.

items.prompt: A type override on base_driver means…
choices: Every create of that type uses the substituted type
items.explain: Type overrides apply globally for that requested type.

items.prompt: Using `new()` directly on UVM components preserves factory override behavior.
items.explain: Factory create (type_id::create) is what honors overrides.
